title: My Sister Forged My Signature, Stole My Condo, And Rented It Out. So I Let Her Lose Her House.
description: My sister forged my signature on a quitclaim deed for my aunt's condo, rented it out, and pocketed $40,000 while I paid the mortgage. I moved back in the day the lease ended, changed the locks, sued for fraud, and the court awarded me triple damages and a lien on her house. #revenge #familybetrayal #justice
thumb_text: SHE FORGED MY DEED. I LIENED HER HOUSE.

thumb_lines.text: SHE POCKETED $40,000 IN RENT WHILE I PAID THE MORTGAGE
I MOVED BACK IN AND SUED FOR FRAUD
TRIPLE DAMAGES AND LIEN ON HER HOUSE
